fingerprints: Legacy JBoss remoting or invoker servlet endpoints exposed
signals: POST to /invoker/readonly returns JBoss-specific error or serialized handling path
Application exposes old JBoss stack markers in headers or error pages
verification_summary: POST a benign serialized probe or invalid stream to /invoker/readonly and confirm JBoss deserialization handling
exploitation_summary: POST ysoserial-compatible gadget stream to /invoker/readonly for id, whoami, or staged shell command

signals: JMX console pages load without authentication or with weak/default credentials
DeploymentFileRepository operation pages can be invoked from browser or curl
verification_summary: GET HtmlAdaptor inspectMBean page for DeploymentFileRepository and confirm method store is exposed
exploitation_summary: Invoke store operation to write a JSP webshell into deploy/ or exposed web root
